div.p: Role: Exponential decay rate for first moment (gradient mean). Status: Standard value ✓ Impact: Controls how much "history" of the gradient direction is kept.
Role: Non-standard decay for second moment (variance). Context: Transformer "Attention Is All You Need" (2017). Logic: Faster decay (0.98 vs 0.999) aids convergence in specific warmup schedules.
Role: Numerical stability constant. Function: Prevents division by zero in bias-corrected variance estimates. Status: Standard value ✓

ul.li: Adaptation: Faster tracking of gradient variance changes compared to default 0.999.
Stability: Crucial when using high learning rates with short linear warmups (Transformer-specific).
Memory: Total state footprint is 3x parameter size: (Params [W] + Momentum [M] + Velocity [V]).
